/usr/bin/c++   -pthread -Wall -funroll-loops -Wno-ignored-attributes -Wno-unused-result -march=armv8-a+simd+crypto+crc -std=c++11 -O3 -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_audit_phase_fair_check_bench_IF.dir/audit_phase_fair_check_bench_IF.cpp.o -o ../bin/test_audit_phase_fair_check_bench_IF  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libemp-tool.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/openssl/lib/libcrypto.dylib /usr/local/lib/libemp-zk.dylib
